headline: Founder & Principal Consultant, Brock Leadership Group | Org Psychology PhD | Executive Coach (PCC) | Host, Leading Out Loud
summary: I help leaders build teams where people can tell the truth without flinching. Psychological safety isn't a soft nicety; it is the measurable difference between a team that surfaces problems early and one that hides them until they are expensive. Through Brock Leadership Group, my podcast Leading Out Loud, and the research behind my book The Safety Equation, I translate two decades of organizational psychology into practices leaders can actually use on a Tuesday.
